ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word" TEXT /* The word itself */,
  "translation" TEXT /* Translation of the word */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the word */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context in which the word is commonly used */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence using the word */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the word (e.g., book, article, website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_choices" (
  "choice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word choice */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the choice belongs to */,
  "choice" TEXT /* The word choice */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Frequency of the word choice */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the word choice (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the word choice is used */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the word choice (e.g., book, article, website) */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence using the word choice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("choice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_choices_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, fr, es) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Writing direction (left-to-right, right-to-left, top-to-bottom) */,
  "script" TEXT /* Script used (Latin, Cyrillic, etc.) */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Name of the language in its native script */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the dataset is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, linguist, translator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word the analysis was performed on */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (frequency, context, translation) */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
